MINI MINUTES: Special Apperance by Phil Kildorf for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Sep-12-2017 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Continued To Jul-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Continued To Jan-11-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-20-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF FORD MOTOR CREDIT COMPANY LLC'S Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing is denied without prejudice to being re-filed upon proper service. Ms. Rowe's declaration states that Mr. Sturner's last known residential address is 50 Phelan Avenue, but the proof of service states that that address is a business. The Court takes judicial notice that 50 Phelan Avenue is the address of the City College of San Francisco and is not an address associated with any residence. Because City College is a large educational institution, service was not made in a manner that comports with the requirements of due process. The Court will prepare a form of order.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
